title: Nut Pack V4
description: The fourth version of the legendary Nut Inc nut pack series of modpacks!
body:
This is the fourth iteration of the legendary Nut Pack series created for the Nut Inc Discord server.

https://discord.gg/nut

This modpack aims to provide a semi-vanilla focused experience with improved gameplay aspects to make it more fun, with most notably create being added.

There is a server that the modpack uses, joinable at mc.nutinc.net.
